{{CargoOrgan
|name=Supreme Taoist Fetus
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10920
|idx=131
|description=Super Gene's failed attempt to mass-produce cultivators by reverse-engineering a 5,000-year-old fetus found in a Taoist's basement freezer. The clones kept reciting blockchain mantras.
|skill=
|hp=3780
|def=238
|atk=244
|rush=210
|gene1=Fire DMG +120
|gene2=In Gene Sims, {race} ATK +100
|gene3=In Gene Sims, Ignore DEF +4%
|gene4=Gene Simulation Power Checks -8%
|gene5=In Gene Sims, Round 1 DMG +20%
|gene6=Wind DMG +120
|gene7=In Gene Sims, Ignore DEF +4% (Awakened)
|}}
